name: io.github.autotelicbydesign/patha
description: Local-first AI memory with Vedic-recitation + Aboriginal-songline architecture. Synthesis-intent routing answers aggregation queries with zero LLM tokens at recall. Includes belief layer with non-destructive supersession, plasticity, and explicit cognitive-status tagging.

runtimeArguments.description: Run the Patha MCP server on stdio.

environmentVariables.description: Override the on-disk store path. Default: ~/.patha
environmentVariables.name: PATHA_STORE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Enable/disable Phase-1 retrieval inside the MCP server. Default: on.
environmentVariables.name: PATHA_PHASE1

environmentVariables.description: Enable/disable the gaṇita synthesis index. Default: on.
environmentVariables.name: PATHA_GANITA
